workspace-tooling.description: Shared repo-root build/lint/type-check/formatting config — not owned by any single package or app.

test-infrastructure.description: Test setup, runners, fixtures, and seeding used to exercise a unit — vitest config, mock data, scenario seeds.

package-scaffold.description: Initial package/app skeleton — manifest, tsconfig, barrel exports, directory layout.

archive-structure.description: The two-axis knowledge archive — index.json, schema, append/check tooling, compaction rules.

database-schema.description: SQLite storage substrate — Drizzle schema tables, db connection, schema init, migrations.

data-access.description: Store ports and their SQLite implementations — query/update operations over the schema (LearningStore, ContentStore, ReviewStore, AnswerEventStore, …).

logging.description: Structured logging port and implementations (Noop/Pino), context and correlation.

api-contract.description: HTTP wire-format types shared across client and server — response envelope, error codes, zod schemas.

http-server.description: HTTP API surface — Hono app, routes, middleware, Workers/node runtime.

spaced-repetition.description: SRS scheduling core — FSRS interval computation, due-date scheduling, review-card state.

review-session.description: Running a review pass — fetching due cards, auto-rating answers, re-scheduling. The app-level review flow, distinct from the scheduling core.

session-lifecycle.description: Adaptive learning session orchestration — init/advance, active pool, queue, batch loop.

batch-composition.description: Assembling quiz batches from the active pool — question generation, MCQ composition.

mastery-tracking.description: Per-word learning state — streaks, mastery thresholds, graduation.

shelving.description: Word shelving policy — easy/okay/hard shelf boundaries and distributions.

curriculum.description: Learning content — decks, words, sentences, curriculum import and curation.

audio-timing.description: Audio playback and WebVTT cue timing — wavesurfer control, marker authoring, audio metadata.

ui-components.description: Vue 3 single-file components — quiz cards, dashboards, audio UI.

ui-state.description: Vue 3 composables holding app state and API communication.
